evals.prompt: Run a full competitor analysis — who are we up against and where are we falling behind?
evals.expected_output: A competitor matrix with all local chiropractors within 10km, their strengths/weaknesses, and specific gaps Banora Chiropractic can exploit

assertions.name: identifies_3plus_competitors
assertions.description: Identifies at least 3 real competitor practices by name
assertions.check: Names at least 3 distinct competitor chiropractic practices

assertions.name: includes_competitor_websites
assertions.description: Provides competitor website URLs for verification
assertions.check: Includes actual website URLs for competitors

assertions.name: provides_actionable_gaps
assertions.description: Identifies specific gaps or opportunities, not just descriptions
assertions.check: Lists specific actionable opportunities where Banora Chiropractic can improve relative to competitors

assertions.name: uses_real_data
assertions.description: Uses real data from web searches, not fabricated information
assertions.check: Competitor names, locations, and details match real businesses that can be verified

evals.prompt: What keywords should we be targeting to rank #1 in our area?
evals.expected_output: Prioritized keyword list organized by intent with competition assessment and recommended target pages

assertions.name: includes_location_keywords
assertions.description: Keywords include local modifiers (banora point, tweed heads, etc.)
assertions.check: Keywords include geographic modifiers like 'banora point', 'tweed heads', 'coolangatta'

assertions.name: organized_by_intent
assertions.description: Keywords are categorized by search intent
assertions.check: Keywords are organized into categories based on intent (navigational, informational, transactional) or similar grouping

assertions.name: includes_priority_ranking
assertions.check: Each keyword or cluster has a priority level or ranking

assertions.name: serp_backed
assertions.description: Keyword recommendations are informed by actual SERP data
assertions.check: References what is currently ranking for key terms, not just theoretical keyword suggestions

evals.prompt: Audit our website banorachiropractic.com.au and tell us what to fix first for better Google rankings
evals.expected_output: On-page SEO audit with specific issues found and prioritized fix list

assertions.name: fetches_actual_website
assertions.description: Actually fetches and analyzes the real website content
assertions.check: References specific content from banorachiropractic.com.au (page titles, actual text, structure)

assertions.name: checks_title_meta
assertions.description: Evaluates title tags and meta descriptions
assertions.check: Analyzes the current title tag and meta description with specific improvement suggestions

assertions.name: prioritized_recommendations
assertions.description: Fixes are prioritized by impact, not just listed
assertions.check: Recommendations have priority levels (high/medium/low) or are ordered by impact

assertions.name: specific_not_generic
assertions.description: Recommendations are specific to this site, not generic SEO advice
assertions.check: Suggestions reference specific pages, content, or elements from the Banora Chiropractic website
